content:
About

Laura Creates Studio is a one-person brand and identity practice in Dearborn, Michigan, built on hand-lettering and a love of considered type. Working with small makers and growing brands since 2022.
title: About

content:
Services

Brand identity, logotypes and wordmarks, packaging lettering, and custom hand-lettering for print. Project-based, with a short discovery call to start.
title: Services

content:
Work

Selected projects, including label systems for Harbor Candle Co. and brand identities for local makers. Full case studies on the journal.
title: Work

content:
Contact

For project inquiries, reach the studio at hello@lauracreates.studio. Currently booking projects for the next quarter.
title: Contact

content:
Journal

Craft-notes on lettering, process, and the occasional studio update.
title: Journal

content:
Workshops

Seasonal brush-lettering workshops at the Dearborn Community Arts Center. Twelve seats, beginner-friendly, all materials provided.
title: Workshops
